_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: a small set of 1446 differential expressed genes (4.2% of total genes) were identified
details: Identified 1446 differential expressed genes (4.2% of total genes) from >39,000 transcripts representing ~34,000 mouse genes
